_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: Rictor deletion almost completely eliminated both phosphorylation of Akt Ser473 and Akt Thr308, and thus inhibited Akt activity in malignant gliomas from p53 ∆E5–6 Rictor ∆/∆ CKO mice
details: Rictor deletion almost completely eliminated both phosphorylation of Akt Ser473 and Akt Thr308, inhibiting Akt activity in malignant gliomas
